purpose: Given a PREREQ_GAP { type: MISSING_FABRIC_INTERFACE }, autonomously build the missing fabric interface: NODE convergence → multi-model generation → arbiter panel validation → compile check → derive registry fields → register in fabric registry.

n1.description: Retrieve ARCH_PATTERN for fabric interfaces in this service category, plus existing interface examples from the codebase

output.patterns: ARCH_PATTERN + FLOW_DESIGN patterns for interface generation

n2.description: Build NODE for the missing interface. Multi-model convergence produces verified representation.

n3.description: Generate the interface file + mock provider + unit tests in parallel across N providers.
n3._generatorNote: VERIFY these token names match the actual registered provider tokens in fabrics.module.ts before Phase B.

prompt.system: Generate a fabric interface. Follow the NODE representation from convergence. No direct SDK imports, injectable via @Inject token, with a mock provider for testing.

n4.description: 7 specialized blind arbiters verify the generated interface. blockSemantics: ANY_BLOCK_CLASS_REJECTS.

business_logic.expertise: Does this interface correctly represent the service domain?

security.expertise: No direct SDK imports, no credential leakage, injectable via token

skills_patterns.expertise: Follows existing fabric interface patterns in the codebase

prompts_compliance.expertise: Generated from NODE, not from hallucinated requirements

completeness.expertise: Interface + mock + tests all present, all methods implemented

n5b.description: Extract registry fields from the generated interface file content.

n7-register.description: Register the new interface in xiigen-fabric-registry. Emit FabricInterfaceReady event. Store DESIGN_REASONING DPO triple (Tier 1).

n8-fail.description: Compilation failed. Store failure as GAP_SIGNAL. Do NOT register the interface.

ironRules: CF-792: Generated interface MUST NOT import any SDK directly — fabric-first pattern mandatory
CF-793: Generated interface MUST include a mock provider — testability is non-negotiable
CF-794: DPO triple MUST have curriculumTier=1 and category=DESIGN_REASONING
qualityGates: Mock provider implements all interface methods
Interface registered in xiigen-fabric-registry after generation
